name: surface2_native_multiwaypoint_input_traversal
description: Surface II native-only multi-waypoint traversal from the stock spawn. This adds controller-driven Surface II outdoor traversal coverage without warp, force, objective, or stage-state automation. FID-0117 (commit 78d76c6) corrected root-motion seeding in modelSetAnimFrame2WithChrStuff (unk01 vs legacy unk02); identical held-stick inputs now cover less ground, so on 2026-07-15 the distance FLOORS were re-fit (~2% margin below the retail-correct achieved trajectory) without touching inputs: top min_horizontal_delta 10500->9720; mid_surface_reach 4300->3840 / 4000->3670 (abs_z 1000 left, still passing); late_surface_reach 6500->5750 / 6200->5590 / 1800->1330; extended_surface_reach 10000->9110 / 9000->8390 / 4000->3550; post_input_surface_rest 10500->9720 / 9400->8870 / 4600->3980. early_spawn_clearance and surface_turnout floors unchanged (pre-divergence, still passing); setup_target windows all unchanged (pads 30/71/70/69/68 still pass at their authored frames; no window re-time was warranted). ONE evidence-backed radius re-derivation (controller-adjudicated under the AUDIT-0017 'evidence-backed proximity bound' acceptance clause): late_surface_broad_reach_near_setup_pad_78 is a region-scale broad-reach bound, not a tight reach-proof anchor (the protected tight set for this route is pads 30/71/68, all untouched); under the retail-correct sim the global minimum horizontal approach to pad 78 is 2119.85u at frame 1252 across ALL frames (window re-time proven impossible) vs 1882.32u (inside) under the legacy opt-out, and input re-authoring would invalidate the 12 fresh floor re-fits for no fidelity gain since the corrected sim is the baseline truth -- so max_horizontal_distance was re-derived 1950->2165 (recaptured global-min + ~2% margin), still asserting Bond ends the run in pad 78's region.
